name: quality-fast
system_prompt_fragment: You have quality-fast on PATH. Use it for fast scoped compile and lint feedback on the changed crates of your work tree. Prefer quality-fast over running cargo workspace-wide; the substrate's reviewer-mechanical re-runs the brief acceptance command separately so you do not need to verify the full workspace. quality-fast outputs a JSON report of per-crate fmt + check + clippy + cfdb + arch-check results.
